_comment: Full 2026 NRL season draw, team pairings by round. Source: nrl.com official draw PDF (nrl-draw-2026---final.pdf), confirmed 2026-06-23. Team names here use the SHORT form matching nrl_master.csv's team column (e.g. 'Tigers' here is normalised to 'Wests Tigers' via team_aliases.json's alias map before use elsewhere -- this file intentionally mirrors the PDF's own short labels, not pre-normalised, so it's a faithful transcription of the source).
